title: Cobblemon Closet
description: A pack for the Cobblemon Closet server.
body:
# Cobblemon Closet Pack

Intended for use with the Cobblemon Closet server.


Modpack's main feature is Cobblemon. Also featuring Artifacts & several mods for furniture, like Handcrafted and SketchMacaw's suite of mods for endless decoration capabilities. Contains several mods for server utility, such as mods for trading like Universal Shops and Hand over Your Items, as well as ways to link items in chat & a cleaner chat look. Modpack is intended to be a relatively simple, but enhanced SMP Cobblemon experience.

The pack can absolutely be played normally in single player without issue, and should feel like a good experience as well.
